landing.heroDescription: Capture, replay, and inspect customer sessions with the real Chrome DevTools. Open source. MIT licensed. Self-hostable.
landing.featuresTitle: Built for the way you actually debug
landing.featuresSubtitle: Every primitive a senior engineer reaches for, in one place.
landing.quickStartSubtitle: Drop the SDK in, point your dev console at the dashboard. Done.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Self-host today, or grab the hosted plan when it lands.

pricing.title: Self-host free,
pricing.subtitle: Use the open-source release on your own infrastructure forever, or join the hosted waiting list.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your team workspace.
